title: Vr Box Hat
description: Adds the Vr Box glasses to the player
body:
**This small resource pack replaces the carved pumpkin with a Vr Box VR glasses — perfect for VR-themed survival, roleplay, or just fun screenshots.**

📦 Features:

Replaces the carved pumpkin with a 3D model of the Vr Box

Only activates when the pumpkin is renamed to VrBox in an anvil

Works perfectly in VR with [ViveCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft) or QuestCraft

Great for videos, memes, or immersive tech roleplay

⚙️ Requirements:

✅ OptiFine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (for custom item textures to work)

✅ Rename a carved pumpkin to Vr Box using an anvil

✅ For Minecraft versions above 1.21.1, since CIT Resewn is no longer updated, you need to use the [Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit/versions) mod instead
